title: kulihah
description:
This made as a tracking transfer trial. When the dragon appears in the hole, one head and one torso appear, and the torso tracks to the head. And the head turns in the direction of the nearby player.
Due to its nature, it can only act one dragon.
body:
I summoned three dragons naturally and rode the Nether dragon, making it behave in an Eastern style against the boss, the Ender Dragon.  Introduce a guardian god who chases the player. Currently, it doesn't fight enemies or give you good effects. There are three types of largeness.
This made as a tracking transfer trial. When the dragon appears in the hole, one head and one torso appear, and the torso tracks to the head. And the head turns in the direction of the nearby player.
Due to its nature, it can only act one dragon in the world at a time, so when the second dragon appears, the first dragon is supposed to disappear. Due to weight control, the dragon has a small hit judgment and cannot be defeated.
